since_last: 27% of 100 AI names green; Data Center, Power & Energy leads -0.11%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 27% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.68% · BTC -0.94% · Gold +0.69% · Nasdaq100 -1.53%. 27% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. Data Center, Power & Energy is doing the heavy lifting at -0.11%.

cards.headline: Data Center, Power & Energy leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Data Center, Power & Energy at -0.11%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -3.26%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ISRG is the standout at -12.65%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +4.02%, PANW +2.72%, LEU +2.18%, CSCO +2.12%, VST +1.55%. Laggards: ISRG -12.65%, PUBM -6.16%, UPST -5.41%, AMAT -5.20%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.16% at $124.35
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.16% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
